scope: DIAG-LAB-A post-approval guarded-send and reply-monitor runbook; internal only until Raj approval
approval_gate: Do not send unless Raj explicitly replies APPROVE TEMPLATE DIAG-LAB-A

monitor_rows.pre_send_verification_required: Re-fetch public source URL and confirm same public email immediately before send if approval arrives after 19:15 IST or if any source looks stale.
monitor_rows.send_method_after_approval: aics_mail_send_guard.py from contact@aicloudstrategist.com; one recipient per send; no CC/BCC/bulk.
monitor_rows.allowed_reply_action: classify only; draft follow-up for Raj approval if interested/unclear; do not auto-send follow-up.
monitor_rows.stop_condition: bounce/unsubscribe/not interested; log and do not follow up.
